sections_cited: Section 7E of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 4339 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on Misc. No. 19175/2024 (U/A) 2) For orders on Misc. No. 19176/2024 (Ex/A) 3) For orders on Misc. No. 19177/2024 (Stay/A) 4) For hearing of main case. 06.09.2024. Mr. Arshad Hussain, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ------------------------- 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Learned Assistant Attorney General present in Court waives notice of this case. Through this petition, the Petitioners have challenged the vires of Section 7E of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. It appears that this Court has already decided this controversy in the case reported as Hakimsons (Impex) (Pvt) Ltd & Others V/S Federation of Pakistan and Others (PLD 2024 Sindh 132), whereby, the Petitions stand dismissed. Accordingly, in view of above, this Petition is dismissed for the reasons so assigned in the aforesaid judgment. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
